title: Dynamic Lighting
description: A dynamic light for all light-emitting items and glowing entities
body:
# **Dynamic Lighting**

adds dynamic lighting to Minecraft, All light-emitting items and glowing entities produce light that follows them around ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ei1akpCL/images/b273dabd35c9d12f56949b707368459aa1dd3a68.png) ## Light Levels | Light Level | Brightness | Light Sources | Entities | |------------|------------|---------------|----------| | **15** | Brightest | Glowstone, Sea Lantern, Lantern, Jack O'Lantern, Shroomlight, Beacon, All Froglights (Verdant, Pearlescent, Ochre) | Blazes | | **14** | Bright | Torch, Campfire, Lava Bucket, End Rod | — | | **10** | Medium | Soul Torch, Soul Lantern, Soul Campfire, Redstone Torch, Glow Berries | Magma Cubes, Glow Squids | | **7** | Dim | Blaze Rod, Blaze Powder, Glowstone Dust, Glow Ink Sac | — |
